Contact Now Membership I AM Aware Join our premium membership programme to make your life happier and healthier
                  avail exclusive benefits. Book Now Prognosis Laboratories is a state of the art! “Centre for Excellence in Medical Diagnostics”. Committed to the service of humanity for over 2 decades. The laboratory is a cheerful and spacious facility, housed in approximately 7000 sq. ft. of dedicated lab area. A vast array of best-in-class equipment and a team of highly experienced technical staff put us on par with the very best in the industry. A supremely accomplished and experienced team of doctors across various diagnostic specialities including Pathology, Microbiology, Biochemistry and Radiology constantly mentor the technical staff and monitor all technology platforms at the lab to get the best out of both men and the machines. At Prognosis Labs we believe that “quality is not a skill but a habit” . We try our best to ensure that our patients are offered utmost care, comfort, attention, and immaculate results, thus bringing relief to the patients whose lives we touch every day in their hour of need.
